completed_tasks.name: Plan 01 — Baseline persistence + auto-snapshot flood guard

decisions.decision: localStorage key baselineCleared_{projectId} persists until explicit user action (save or select baseline)
decisions.rationale: UX preference, not auth data — acceptable to persist across sessions

decisions.decision: Divider-only grouping (no text labels) for toolbar
decisions.rationale: Matches SPA's simple toolbar style; labels would add vertical height and break fixed 56px toolbar height

decisions.decision: Search input stays ungrouped as last .plan-toolbar child
decisions.rationale: Floats rightmost, visually distinct from the 4 control clusters

open_findings.description: restoreIteration() doesn't call dismissUndoToast() when iter.auto===true — stale undo toast from prior manual restore can persist and undo to wrong snapshot
open_findings.fix: Add dismissUndoToast() unconditionally at top of restoreIteration()

next_action: Phase 97.1 complete — next: /gsd:ship to merge v3.3 to main, or start next phase
context_notes: All 4 browser UAT checks passed by user. Phase fully closed. WR-01 is low-priority and does not block shipping.
